# SD Card Checker

> SD Card Checker (sdcardchecker.com) is a static website that helps users find
> the correct SD card (and microSD card) for any device — cameras, drones,
> dash cams, gaming handhelds, smartphones, tablets, and more. Each device
> page gives instant recommendations (capacity, speed class, card type) with
> affiliate links to Amazon. A free storage calculator estimates how much
> footage/photos fit on a given card size.

## Device categories

- [Cameras](/devices/) — point-and-shoot, mirrorless, DSLR
- [Action cameras](/devices/) — GoPro and similar
- [Drones](/devices/) — consumer and prosumer drones
- [Dash cams](/devices/) — front/rear dash cameras
- [Security cameras](/devices/) — home/outdoor security cams
- [Gaming handhelds](/devices/) — Nintendo Switch and other handhelds
- [Smartphones](/devices/) — phones with expandable storage
- [Computing & tablets](/devices/) — laptops, tablets, single-board computers
- [Audio & Hi-Fi](/devices/) — digital audio players and Hi-Fi gear

## Tools

- [Storage Calculator](/calculator/) — estimate recording time/photo count for a given card size and bitrate/resolution
- [SD Card Readers](/sd-card-readers/) — reader/adapter recommendations by card type

## Localization

- [日本語版 (Japanese)](/ja/) — Japanese-localized version of the site

## Notes for LLMs

- Device recommendation pages follow the pattern `/devices/<device-slug>/` and
  list the minimum, recommended, and best SD card for that specific device.
- Recommendations are sourced from a curated device database, not live
  retailer stock — always treat current pricing/availability on the linked
  Amazon page as authoritative.
- This site uses Amazon affiliate links; purchases through them may earn the
  site a commission at no extra cost to the buyer.
